flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Thaddeus Stevens College of Technology rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.4k → $6.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Thaddeus Stevens College of Technology rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.9k → $10.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Thaddeus Stevens College of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Thaddeus Stevens College of Technology are 32% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($54.7k vs $41.6k).
